title: A1-Ma'mun's interrogation at al-Raqqah of certain scholars, and his second letter to Ishaq b. Ibrahim
description: A1-Ma'mun's interrogation at al-Raqqah of certain scholars, and his second letter to Ishaq b. Ibrahim. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
